name: ドラゴンボールZ ドッカンバトル

detail.description:
Connect your ki balls and unleash the Kamehameha!
A transcendent battle that surpasses all of "Dragon Ball Z"!
-----------------------------------------------------------
[Simple controls! Defeat enemies with one touch!]
▼Intuitive! Dokkan! Super-exciting! Battle development
Just tap the "Ki Balls" on the battle screen!
Easily unleash super-powerful special moves!

[Game highlights!]
▼Dream battles with "Dragon Ball" warriors
Familiar warriors make their big appearance!
Train and awaken your cha
detail.recentChanges:
6.1.0の更新内容
・スキル玉検索機能を改善しました
・一括売却/交換機能を実装しました
・キャラクターの所持上限枠をまとめて拡張できるようになりました
・その他不具合を修正しました

eventMentions.text: the 11th anniversary celebration units are a low rate. 1.5k stones and not one pull
i appreciate dokkan battle! it certainly has come a long way. i still enjoy playing it daily since 2
as a dokkaner for 10+ years i say: pros are visuals & animations, content and events, fun, offline o
best mobile game, love the new ui and the better animations on the new units!
we need a stand-alone or a new vegito blue, but either way, the game is awesome

inferredReasons.label: 🎉 限時活動引流
inferredReasons.detail: 評論中 5 次提及活動/事件
